hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in *"git commit"*) h=$(git diff "$(git merge-base main HEAD)" | shasum | cut -d' ' -f1); if [ -f "/tmp/claude-pr-selfreview-$h" ]; then exit 0; else printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Run /pr-self-review on the current diff before committing. Commit is blocked until a self-review passes (no CRITICAL findings) for these exact changes."}}'; fi ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

sid=$(jq -r '.session_id // "nosession"'); f="/tmp/claude-insights-$sid"; [ -f "$f" ] && exit 0; touch "$f"; printf '%s' '{"decision":"block","reason":"Before ending this session: if it was substantive (>30 min with a real problem, decision, or discovery), run /engineering-insights to append what you learned to the matching INSIGHTS.md (append-only, per-package). If it was trivial (a quick question or tiny edit), just stop normally without running it. Do not run it more than once per session."}'
